items.from: What time does the meeting start?
It starts at eleven o'clock.
I am working from home today.
Can you send me the document today?
items.to: Ты можешь отправить мне документ сегодня?

items.from: I will send it in a few minutes.
items.to: Я отправлю это через несколько минут.

items.from: Sorry, I am busy right now.
Let's talk later.
Could you help me with this?
items.to: Ты мог бы помочь мне с этим?

items.from: I forgot my password.
Can you reset it for me?
items.to: Ты можешь сбросить его для меня?

items.from: The internet is very slow today.
My connection keeps dropping.
I will arrive a little late.
Do you have any plans for the weekend?
items.to: У тебя есть планы на выходные?

items.from: I want to relax at home.
Could you speak more slowly?
Can you write it down, please?
The shop is closed today.
I will send you the address.
See you soon!
